name: Peanut Butter Chocolate Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Line an 8 inch pan with wax paper.
2. Melt peanut butter chips, 6 oz condensed milk, and 2 tbsp butter in a saucepan, stirring occasionally until the mixture is smooth. Remove from heat.
3. Stir in chopped peanuts (if using) and spread the mixture into the prepared pan.
4. In another saucepan, melt chocolate-chips, 4 oz condensed milk, and 2 tbsp butter until smooth.
5. Pour the melted chocolate over the peanut butter mixture and spread evenly.
6. Chill the fudge for 2 hours or until firm.
7. Turn onto a cutting board. Peel off the wax paper and cut into squares.
8. Store tightly covered.
